barRaise.topFinding: The finding that defined this project for nine straight audits is gone. The .finances/ bank statements are no longer in git history: the three leak commits (44b7b10, f670d17, 43ea16b) now fail git cat-file with 'not a valid object name', reachable history is 47 clean commits, and git ls-remote origin HEAD returns 6c4037c matching local, so anyone cloning the public repo now gets a clean tree. The HIGH drops to MEDIUM only because a positive remote re-verify of the old SHAs (and possibly a GitHub GC request) still has to happen from an authed machine, which this run could not do. What remains is steady-state residue: keytar still sits archived on the encrypted boot path, the work-queue still carries shipped-but-unpruned YaB rows with one item now nine days blocked-on-user, and the gitignored clutter grew by one more file. The trajectory is the best it has been; the verdict is one manual remote confirmation away from healthy.
